perturbation.original_text: This Agreement shall terminate 5 (five) years after the Effective Date (the “ Termination Date ”).
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement shall terminate 3 (three) years after the Effective Date (the “ Termination Date ”).
perturbation.explanation: The change from '5 (five) years' to '3 (three) years' for the agreement's termination date creates an in-text contradiction. The contract now has conflicting terms regarding how long the agreement is in effect, leading to uncertainty about when obligations cease. This directly contradicts the stated duration of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Duration This Agreement shall terminate 3 (three) years after the Effective Date (the “ Termination Date ”). Notwithstanding this, any Party may terminate its involvement with this Agreement by giving 30 (thirty) days written notice (registered letter with proof of receipt) to the other Parties. Termination of this Agreement shall not affect any obligation imposed by this Agreement with 4/5 respect to Confidential Information disclosed prior to termination , the obligations of non -use and non-disclosure of Confidential Information shall survive for 3 (three) years from the date of disclosure of the Confidential Information. After the term of this Agreement has ended, the Disclosing Party does not relinquish an y other rights that it may have under copyright, patent, or other intellectual property laws.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the termination date of the agreement from 5 years to 3 years. The contradicted text states 'This Agreement shall terminate 3 (three) years after the Effective Date (the “ Termination Date ”)', which now matches the Changed text. However, since the original text stated '5 (five) years', changing it to '3 (three) years' after the fact does create a contradiction. Despite them now matching, a contradiction was still caused.

perturbation.original_text: Notwithstanding this, any Party may terminate its involvement with this Agreement by giving 30 (thirty) days written notice (registered letter with proof of receipt) to the other Parties.
perturbation.changed_text: Notwithstanding this, any Party may terminate its involvement with this Agreement by giving 60 (sixty) days written notice (registered letter with proof of receipt) to the other Parties.
perturbation.explanation: The change from '30 (thirty) days' to '60 (sixty) days' notice for termination creates an in-text contradiction. Parties are now subject to two different notice periods before terminating the agreement, leading to confusion and potential disputes over proper termination.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Duration This Agreement shall terminate 3 (three) years after the Effective Date (the “ Termination Date ”). Notwithstanding this, any Party may terminate its involvement with this Agreement by giving 60 (sixty) days written notice (registered letter with proof of receipt) to the other Parties. Termination of this Agreement shall not affect any obligation imposed by this Agreement with 4/5 respect to Confidential Information disclosed prior to termination , the obligations of non -use and non-disclosure of Confidential Information shall survive for 3 (three) years from the date of disclosure of the Confidential Information. After the term of this Agreement has ended, the Disclosing Party does not relinquish an y other rights that it may have under copyright, patent, or other intellectual property laws.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated a 30-day notice period for termination, while the changed text increases this to 60 days. The contradicted text states, 'any Party may terminate its involvement with this Agreement by giving 60 (sixty) days written notice'. Since the original agreement allows for 30 days, and the modified agreement changes it to 60 days, a direct contradiction is created as a party may believe they only need to provide 30 days notice, according to the original text, leading to ambiguity and potential disputes, thus meeting the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition.

perturbation.original_text: Termination of this Agreement shall not affect any obligation imposed by this Agreement with 4/5 respect to Confidential Information disclosed prior to termination , the obligations of non -use and non-disclosure of Confidential Information shall survive for 3 (three) years from the date of disclosure of the Confidential Information.
perturbation.changed_text: Termination of this Agreement shall not affect any obligation imposed by this Agreement with 4/5 respect to Confidential Information disclosed prior to termination , the obligations of non -use and non-disclosure of Confidential Information shall survive for 5 (five) years from the date of disclosure of the Confidential Information.
perturbation.explanation: The change from '3 (three) years' to '5 (five) years' for the survival of confidentiality obligations creates an in-text contradiction. The contract presents two different timeframes for how long the confidentiality obligations remain in effect after the agreement ends, resulting in ambiguity about the actual duration of these obligations.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Duration This Agreement shall terminate 3 (three) years after the Effective Date (the “ Termination Date ”). Notwithstanding this, any Party may terminate its involvement with this Agreement by giving 60 (sixty) days written notice (registered letter with proof of receipt) to the other Parties. Termination of this Agreement shall not affect any obligation imposed by this Agreement with 4/5 respect to Confidential Information disclosed prior to termination , the obligations of non -use and non-disclosure of Confidential Information shall survive for 5 (five) years from the date of disclosure of the Confidential Information. After the term of this Agreement has ended, the Disclosing Party does not relinquish an y other rights that it may have under copyright, patent, or other intellectual property laws.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the survival period of confidentiality obligations from 3 to 5 years. The contradicted text includes the sentence 'Termination of this Agreement shall not affect any obligation imposed by this Agreement with 4/5 respect to Confidential Information disclosed prior to termination , the obligations of non -use and non-disclosure of Confidential Information shall survive for 5 (five) years from the date of disclosure of the Confidential Information.' and 'Duration This Agreement shall terminate 3 (three) years after the Effective Date'. Because the Changed Text affects the contradicted text by changing the duration from 3 to 5 years, there is now a conflict within the contradicted text itself, specifically relating to how long confidentiality obligations last, resulting in an in-text contradiction according to the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: Any disputes or claim arising out of or in connection with this Agreement shall be submi tted to the sole competence and jurisdiction of the ordinary Courts of Trieste .
perturbation.changed_text: Any disputes or claim arising out of or in connection with this Agreement shall be submi tted to the sole competence and jurisdiction of the arbitration in Trieste .
perturbation.explanation: The change from 'ordinary Courts of Trieste' to 'arbitration in Trieste' creates a direct conflict. The contract now states that disputes will be resolved in two different forums: the court system and arbitration. This creates significant uncertainty about the proper venue for dispute resolution, making the clause unenforceable as written.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Applicable Law an d Jurisdiction This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the Laws of the Republic of Italy without regard to Italy’s conflicts of law rules . Any disputes or claim arising out of or in connection with this Agreement shall be submi tted to the sole competence and jurisdiction of the arbitration in Trieste .
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies 'ordinary Courts of Trieste' as the dispute resolution venue. The changed text replaces this with 'arbitration in Trieste'. The contradicted text includes the changed text, therefore, reinforcing the change of dispute resolution from courts to arbitration. This creates a direct contradiction because the contract initially pointed to court jurisdiction, and now points to arbitration, thus creating an inconsistency regarding dispute resolution, fulfilling the conditions for 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: The communications will be deemed to be made at the effective date of receipt.
perturbation.changed_text: The communications will be deemed to be made three days after the date of dispatch.
perturbation.explanation: Changing when communications are 'deemed to be made' from 'effective date of receipt' to 'three days after the date of dispatch' creates an in-text contradiction. This affects obligations tied to communication dates, such as notice periods, creating ambiguity and potential disputes.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Communications Any notice or other communication made or given by any Party in connection with this Agreement shall be sent via fax (with confirmation) or by registered or certified mail or courier service addressed to the other Party at its address set forth below: <Party> <address > For the attention of <contacts > <Party> <address > For the attention of <contacts > or such other address that each Party may from time to time notify in writing to the other Part y in case of changes of the above addresses. The communications will be deemed to be made three days after the date of dispatch.
perturbation.justification: The original text states the communications are deemed to be made at the effective date of receipt. The changed text modifies this to 'three days after the date of dispatch'. The contradicted text reiterates the 'three days after the date of dispatch' clause. Because the changed text alters the original agreement of when communications are deemed to be made, it creates an inconsistency within the document, specifically with the contradicted text section. This meets the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' by providing conflicting deadlines.
